note: Lane 3 (Lifecycle Engine): The previous session built the lifecycle framework but had several issues. I fixed: 1) Engine used opaque processorHandle → now uses typed hook-based approach (onProcessorRun/onRepair). 2) Missing condition:always transition support → added. 3) abort escalation didn't record PhaseResult or call onPhaseExit before returning → fixed. 4) Builtin constant naming was inconsistent → aligned to UPPER_CASE. 5) The Effect API difference between catchAll and catchCause was tricky — the codebase uses catchCause with .pipe(), not catchAll directly. 6) Barrel re-exports needed explicit treatment to avoid TS2308 ambiguity with private PhaseResult type.
